## Livrabile faza

- descrie concret ce se livreaza in acest PR (module/capabilitati)
- include referinte issue/backlog (ex: P1-03, C4-02)

## Regression risks

- enumera riscuri de regresie (functional, securitate, performanta)
- precizeaza impactul si mitigarea planificata

## Verificari post-release

- ce verifici imediat dupa deploy (health, smoke, dashboard, alerte)
- ce metrici urmaresti in primele 30-60 minute

## Release checklist

- [ ] Teste automate relevante rulate (unit/integration/e2e/smoke)
- [ ] Risk assessment actualizat (impact + mitigare)
- [ ] Plan de rollback definit
- [ ] Documentatie actualizata (README/docs/changelog)
